title: The Purple Pavilion's Dare
intro: Purple wizards arrive on a wind that smells of ozone and set up a revel of wild, unleashed workings on Runehold's green — and dare the coven to join them, or to send a champion to their working-contest. The chaos is catching. So is the Purple's regard, for those who dare.

advisors.text: The Purple respect one thing, Archon — nerve. Join them, contest them, but do not stand at the edge and disapprove. That, they never forgive.
Or send them off with their revel. Chaos courted is chaos let in, and the White will think the better of us for the door we keep shut.

choices.label: Join the Purple revel of wild workings

win.text: The coven throws itself into the wild working and comes away crackling, laughing, a little singed — and firm friends of the Pavilion.
win.saga: The coven joined the Purple's revel of wild workings, winning the Pavilion's friendship and a little raw mana besides.

choices.label: Meet their champion in a working-contest

win.text: Your champion out-chaoses their chaos, and the Pavilion roars its approval. Runehold has bragging rights and a doting Purple both.
win.saga: Your champion beat the Purple's own at their working-contest, winning the Pavilion's loud and lasting regard.

lose.text: Your champion is out-matched and half-unmade in the trying. The Purple love a game try, but the wild backlash scars the hold.
lose.saga: Your champion lost the Purple's working-contest and took a wild backlash home, though the Pavilion warmed to the daring.

choices.label: Send the revel on its way

win.text: You bar the green to them, politely. The Purple leave unimpressed — but word of your restraint reaches the White Tower, and it approves.
win.saga: You refused the Purple's revel; the Pavilion cooled toward Runehold, but the orderly White warmed to your restraint.
